_metadata.description: OCI Log Analytics saved search definitions for 360 monitoring dashboard
_metadata.usage: Import into OCI Log Analytics via Saved Searches or use as reference for manual creation

saved_searches.name: CRM-360: Application Errors (Last 1h)
saved_searches.description: All ERROR-level application logs with trace correlation
saved_searches.query: 'Log Source' = 'enterprise-crm-portal' and level = ERROR | stats count as ErrorCount by 'error.type', 'http.url.path' | sort -ErrorCount

saved_searches.name: CRM-360: Slow Requests (>2s)
saved_searches.description: Requests exceeding 2-second latency threshold with trace IDs for APM drilldown
saved_searches.query: 'Log Source' = 'enterprise-crm-portal' and 'performance.slow_request' = true | stats avg('http.response_time_ms') as AvgLatency, count as Count by 'http.url.path' | sort -AvgLatency

saved_searches.name: CRM-360: Request Rate by Endpoint
saved_searches.description: HTTP request throughput grouped by route and status code
saved_searches.query: 'Log Source' = 'enterprise-crm-portal' and message = 'Request completed' | stats count as Requests by 'http.url.path', 'http.status_code' | sort -Requests

saved_searches.name: CRM-360: WAF Security Events
saved_searches.description: WAF detections and security signals from OCI WAF headers
saved_searches.query: 'Log Source' = 'enterprise-crm-portal' and 'security.attack.detected' = true and 'security.attack.type' = security_misconfig | stats count as WafEvents by 'security.source_ip', 'security.waf.score' | sort -WafEvents

saved_searches.name: CRM-360: OWASP Attack Detection
saved_searches.description: All detected security attacks by type and severity with MITRE ATT&CK mapping
saved_searches.query: 'Log Source' = 'enterprise-crm-portal' and 'security.attack.detected' = true | stats count as Attacks by 'security.attack.type', 'security.attack.severity' | sort -Attacks

saved_searches.name: CRM-360: Security Events by Source IP
saved_searches.description: Top attacking IPs with attack type distribution
saved_searches.query: 'Log Source' = 'enterprise-crm-portal' and 'security.attack.detected' = true | stats count as Attacks, distinctcount('security.attack.type') as UniqueAttacks by 'security.source_ip' | sort -Attacks

saved_searches.name: CRM-360: Order Sync Pipeline
saved_searches.description: External order sync operations showing success/failure rates and sources
saved_searches.query: 'Log Source' = 'enterprise-crm-portal' and message = 'External orders sync completed' | stats sum('orders.sync.created') as Created, sum('orders.sync.updated') as Updated, sum('orders.sync.failed') as Failed by 'orders.sync.source' | sort -Created

saved_searches.name: CRM-360: Drone Shop Integration Health
saved_searches.description: Integration calls to Drone Shop portal with latency and error tracking
saved_searches.query: 'Log Source' = 'enterprise-crm-portal' and ('integration.target_service' = 'drone-shop-portal' or 'integration.target_service' = 'octo-drone-shop') | stats count as Calls by 'integration.type' | sort -Calls

saved_searches.name: CRM-360: Database Query Correlation
saved_searches.description: Logs containing DB context for correlation with OPSI/DB Management SQL performance
saved_searches.query: 'Log Source' = 'enterprise-crm-portal' and 'db.target' = 'oracle-atp' | stats count as Events by level | sort -Events

saved_searches.name: CRM-360: Cross-Service Trace Correlation
saved_searches.description: Find all log entries for a specific trace ID across services — the core 360 correlation query
saved_searches.query: 'Log Source' in ('enterprise-crm-portal', 'octo-drone-shop') | where trace_id is not null | stats count as LogEntries, distinctcount('service.name') as Services by trace_id | sort -LogEntries | head 50

saved_searches.name: CRM-360: End-to-End Request Flow
saved_searches.description: Reconstruct full request lifecycle: WAF → LB → App → DB → Response
saved_searches.query: 'Log Source' = 'enterprise-crm-portal' | where trace_id is not null | stats earliest(Time) as FirstEvent, latest(Time) as LastEvent, count as EventCount by trace_id, 'http.url.path' | eval Duration = LastEvent - FirstEvent | sort -Duration | head 20

saved_searches.name: CRM-360: Auth Events (Login/Logout/Failure)
saved_searches.description: Authentication activity for security monitoring and user behavior analysis
saved_searches.query: 'Log Source' = 'enterprise-crm-portal' and (message like '%login%' or message like '%auth%' or 'security.attack.type' in ('broken_auth', 'jwt_bypass', 'rate_limit_bypass')) | stats count as Events by level, 'security.attack.type' | sort -Events

saved_searches.name: CRM-360: Service Health Timeline
saved_searches.description: Application startup, shutdown, and error events for availability tracking
saved_searches.query: 'Log Source' = 'enterprise-crm-portal' and (message like 'Enterprise CRM Portal%' or level = ERROR) | stats count by level, message | sort -count

dashboard.name: Enterprise CRM Portal — 360 Monitoring
dashboard.description: Unified observability dashboard correlating APM traces, logs, WAF events, database performance, and integration health

tabs.name: Security
widgets: CRM-360: Security Events by Source IP
